/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libaruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libaruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/aruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aruco_msgs/msg/detail/aruco_marker__description.c.o CMakeFiles/aruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aruco_msgs/msg/detail/aruco_marker__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/aruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aruco_msgs/msg/detail/aruco_marker__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/aruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aruco_msgs/msg/detail/aruco_markers__description.c.o CMakeFiles/aruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aruco_msgs/msg/detail/aruco_markers__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/aruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/aruco_msgs/msg/detail/aruco_markers__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
